member.name: T:DDG.AllMatcher
member.summary: Matches all strings.

member.name: M:DDG.AllMatcher.Is(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if patterns is a wildcard.

member.name: T:DDG.EndsWithMatcher
member.summary: Represents a string matcher that filters strings based on whether they end with a specific pattern.

member.name: M:DDG.EndsWithMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.EndsWithMatcher.Is(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Determines if the given pattern is an ends with pattern and returns the pattern without the ends with operator.
member.param: The pattern without the ends with operator.
member.returns: true if the pattern is an ends with pattern; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:DDG.ExactMatcher
member.summary: Represents an exact string matcher.

member.name: M:DDG.ExactMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.ExactMatcher.Is(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Determines if the given pattern is an exact match and returns the matched pattern.
member.returns: true if the pattern is an exact match; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:DDG.FastRegexMatcher
member.summary: Represents a fast regex matcher for string matching.

member.name: M:DDG.FastRegexMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:DDG.IStringMatcher
member.summary: Represents a string matcher interface.

member.name: P:DDG.IStringMatcher.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the matcher.

member.name: M:DDG.IStringMatcher.Filter(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String})
member.summary: Filters the original collection based on certain criteria.
member.returns: A sorted set of filtered strings.

member.name: M:DDG.IStringMatcher.IsMatch(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if the input string matches a certain criteria.
member.returns: True if the input string matches the criteria; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:DDG.MatcherBuilder
member.summary: Factory method.

member.name: F:DDG.MatcherBuilder.RegexSpecialChars
member.summary: List all regex special characters.

member.name: F:DDG.MatcherBuilder.WildCardRegex
member.summary: Regex to capture wildcards at the end or beginning of a pattern.

member.name: P:DDG.MatcherBuilder.Cache
member.summary: Gets cache of string matchers.

member.name: M:DDG.MatcherBuilder.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a string matcher based on the given pattern.
member.param: The pattern to build the string matcher for.

member.name: M:DDG.MatcherBuilder.TryGetFirstMatch(System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the first match of the given pattern using the provided matching regex.
member.param: The output pattern if a match is found.
member.returns: True if a match is found, otherwise false.

member.name: T:DDG.PartialMatcher
member.summary: Represents a partial string matcher that implements the interface.

member.name: M:DDG.PartialMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.PartialMatcher.Is(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Determines if the given pattern is a partial match and returns the matched pattern.
member.returns: true if the pattern is a partial match; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:DDG.SlowRegexMatcher
member.summary: Represents a string matcher that uses a slow regular expression matching algorithm.

member.name: M:DDG.SlowRegexMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified pattern.
member.param: The regular expression pattern to match.

member.name: T:DDG.StartsWithMatcher
member.summary: Represents a string matcher that filters strings based on whether they start with a specific pattern.

member.name: M:DDG.StartsWithMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:DDG.StartsWithMatcher.Is(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Determines if the given pattern is a valid starts with pattern and returns the modified pattern.
member.returns: true if the pattern is valid; otherwise, false.
